    1. generate(Clock)

Interface IdGenerator

Functional Interface:
This is a functional interface and can therefore be used as the assignment target for a lambda expression or method reference.
@FunctionalInterface public interface IdGenerator
Produces the UUID written to the id column when the caller did not set one on the OutboxEvent.

The default implementation is UUIDv7 (RFC 9562) which is time-ordered and therefore cheap to index. Custom implementations may supply UUIDv4 or domain-specific identifiers.

Since:
0.1.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UUID
    generate(Clock clock)
    Generates a fresh identifier, optionally honoring clock for timestamp-based UUID variants.

  • Method Details

    • generate

      UUID generate(Clock clock)
      Generates a fresh identifier, optionally honoring clock for timestamp-based UUID variants.
      Parameters:
      clock - the clock to use for timestamp-based variants.
      Returns:
      a fresh identifier.
      Since:
      0.1.0
